calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Atty. Elizabeth MacDonald for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, NA

No appearance by the Defendant: Esther Eun Kyung Ko.
The following exhibit was identified and admitted into evidence:
Exh. 1 - Tucker declaration
After hearing the testimony presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Esther Eun Kyung Ko as follows:

Principal - $2,764.15
Interest - $ 161.24
Atty's fee- 600.00 and Costs- $225.00
Total Judgment - $3,750.39

Counsel stipulated for the return of Exhibit and Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2006 Set For Trial On Aug-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
